2606.16897.title: Contrastive-Difference CKA Reveals Concept-Specific Structural Alignment Across Language Model Architectures
2606.16897.paper_summary: Do different LLM architectures encode high-level concepts in structurally compatible ways? We systematically characterize a geometric-functional universality dissociation: across multiple concept domains and architectural families, moderate geometric convergence coexists with near-perfect functional transfer. Using contrastive-difference CKA (CKA_Delta), a training-free diagnostic that computes kernel alignment on per-sample contrastive differences, we isolate concept-specific convergence from generic similarity -- achieving significant discrimination where standard CKA cannot. The dissociation replicates across all six concept domains we test (five with p <= 0.017 geometric discrimination and safety as a converging-functional trend, p = 0.08), including two non-instruction concepts (code-vs-NL, reasoning-vs-recall) validated without system prompts; a single 70B--70B pair provides an observational note that universality may strengthen with scale, requiring replication with additional >=70B models. We position CKA_Delta as a practical regime classifier and architectural outlier detector (Gemma: d = 1.08, AUC = 0.79) rather than an absolute transfer-accuracy predictor, providing a training-free diagnostic for cross-architecture concept monitoring.
2606.16897.paper_summary_zh: 不同的 LLM 架構是否以結構上相容的方式編碼高階概念？我們系統性地描述了一種幾何-功能的普遍性解離：在多個概念領域和架構家族中，中等的幾何收斂與近乎完美的功能轉移共存。使用對比差異 CKA (CKA_Delta)，這是一種無需訓練的診斷工具，計算每個樣本對比差異上的核對齊，我們將概念特定的收斂與一般相似性隔離開來——在標準 CKA 無法達到的地方實現了顯著的區分。這種解離在我們測試的所有六個概念領域中重現（五個的 p <= 0.017 幾何區分和安全性作為收斂-功能趨勢，p = 0.08），包括兩個非指令概念（代碼對自然語言、推理對回憶），這些概念在沒有系統提示的情況下得到驗證；一對 70B--70B 的組合提供了一個觀察性註釋，表明普遍性可能隨著規模的增強而增強，這需要使用額外的 >=70B 模型進行複製。我們將 CKA_Delta 定位為一種實用的範疇分類器和架構異常檢測器（Gemma: d = 1.08, AUC = 0.79），而不是絕對的轉移準確性預測器，提供了一種無需訓練的診斷工具，用於跨架構概念監測。
2606.16897.author: Xueping Gao et.al.
